objective: Add a pure helper to compute the most-connected node from graph edges and extend carto stats to print its title
key_changes: Add mostConnectedNode() pure helper in src/store/graph.ts (counts from/to incidences, returns sentinel for empty graph)
Extend carto stats CLI action to print most-connected node title alongside existing counts
Add vitest unit tests for degree counting, tie-break, and empty-graph sentinel
Tie-break: first-encountered wins; empty graph returns {node: null, degree: 0}
